name: Extreme OBI-1 Persistence (50-tick horizon)
hypothesis: Extreme top-of-book imbalance (obi_1 > 0.9) has a powerful, persistent price impact. This spec tests if the signal's high predictive power, confirmed at a 20-tick horizon, extends to a 50-tick (approx. 5-second) horizon, mapping its decay profile as recommended by prior feedback.
mutation_note: Following feedback to explore the signal's decay, extended prediction horizon from 20 to 50 ticks.
